topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Deployment & CI/CD. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Software Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Deployment & CI/CD is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Deployment & CI/CD in a real-world scenario
Handling edge cases in Deployment & CI/CD
practiceQuestions: Write a program demonstrating Deployment & CI/CD.
Fix the bug in the given Deployment & CI/CD snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Deployment & CI/CD?
How does Deployment & CI/CD handle memory management?
advancedProjects: Integrate Deployment & CI/CD into a microservice
Scale Deployment & CI/CD for 10k concurrent users
companyQuestions: How Amazon asks about Deployment & CI/CD
